description_long: This information point is a modern, temporary event booth or stage setup, featuring a large printed backdrop with bold text and graphics, flanked by tall rectangular columns in white and pink. The area is furnished with two white sofas and a white coffee table, arranged on a dark rectangular carpet. Professional lighting and audio equipment, including two large speakers on stands and two studio lights, are positioned at the corners, suggesting a setup for interviews, presentations, or public engagement. A person is present, likely to provide information or interact with visitors. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on clear communication and accessibility.
description: A modern event information booth with a large graphic backdrop, white sofas, and professional lighting and audio equipment. The setup is visually striking with pink and white accents and is designed for public interaction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full backdrop with text, both sofas, the coffee table, and all lighting and audio equipment clearly arranged.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the setup, the arrangement of the sofas, and the placement of the lighting and speakers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain backs of the backdrop and columns, with lighting and audio equipment visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, revealing the person seated, the side of the backdrop, and the spatial relationship between the furniture and equipment.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features a large, high-contrast printed graphic with bold text and geometric color blocking, framed by smooth, unornamented columns in white and pink. The overall look is clean and minimal, with a focus on visual clarity and modern branding.
